chin_falam.sr_imported: Organizer an la lut — atu ah nangmah ta ah siar
chin_falam.sr_reset: Arrangement kha a hlan lim ah leng ti
chin_falam.sculpt_engine_failed: Sculpting engine load a si lo.
chin_falam.sculpt_failed: Sculpting a hlawh lo — a fawi deuh mi description in zuam.
chin_falam.assess_failed: Coach nih leh a si lo — ti hna zuam.
chin_falam.sr_assessed: Coach lehnak cu builder panel tang ah a timh cang
chin_falam.recall_needs_more: Hmasa in group 2 chung ah idea 4 tluk belh hna
chin_falam.sr_recall_started: Recall mode: idea vialte tray chung ah an tla. Pakhat cio kha an hmun ah leng koih hna.
chin_falam.sr_recall_complete: Na vawlei kong dihlak kha philh nak in leng na tuah!
chin_falam.snapshot_failed: Hi ah 3D view man a si lo.
chin_falam.print_saved: One-pager download cang — hong hna law print ti
chin_falam.import_replaces: Hi nih na composition tuchan kha a thlen lai.
chin_falam.title: Form Zalong
chin_falam.tagline: Na Form Vawlei kha tuah: archetypal structure thim, na idea he khat, 3D ah koih, law a biapi mi kha sculpt ti.
chin_falam.tagline2: Hi ah nangmah cu ca ttialtu na si — AI cu na hal tikah lawng a bawmh.
chin_falam.keep_content_hint: Na group le na idea an um rih — form thim nih hmun a saibawn lawng a thlen.
chin_falam.recall_title: Recall: na vawlei kha leng tuah
chin_falam.undo_tip: Thlennak a hnu bik kha leng tuah (Ctrl+Z)
chin_falam.print_tip: Print khawh mi one-pager download (snapshot + na idea hna + coach lehnak)
chin_falam.recall_tip: Na idea hna tray ah an tla — philh nak in leng koih hna
chin_falam.assess_tip: AI coach kha na composition dihlak zoh awk ah hal
chin_falam.recall_instructions: Idea vialte an hmun in tang tray ah an tla. Hmun ah idea pakhat thim, cun home ah thlah awk ah group chips (asiloah [ le ] keys) hmang. Lentecelh lio ah zeihmanh khoih a si lo.
chin_falam.recall_complete: na vawlei kong dihlak kha leng na tuah!
chin_falam.title_placeholder: Hi vawlei hi zeikong dah a si?
chin_falam.note_label: Nangmah caah note (3D ah a langh)
chin_falam.note_placeholder: Zeicah hi idea hi hi ah a um?
chin_falam.no_3d: Hi ah 3D space load a si lo — na builder panel cu a rian a ttuan rih, na ttial mi vialte khoih an si.
chin_falam.stage_hint: Hmun ah: idea koih awk ah hnen · hren awk ah background hnen · zoom awk ah scroll · [ le ] nih thim mi idea kha group karlak ah a thlak.
chin_falam.suggestions: A rak ra lai tuahnak kalhmun hna
